greengrass.devicedefinition.device.Certi.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the device certificate for the device. This X.509 certificate is used to authenticate the device with AWS IoT and AWS IoT Greengrass services.

greengrass.devicedefinition.device.Id.Description: A descriptive or arbitrary ID for the device. This value must be unique within the device definition version. Maximum length is 128 characters with pattern `[a-zA-Z0-9:_-]+`.

greengrass.devicedefinition.device.SyncS.Description: Indicates whether the device's local shadow is synced with the cloud automatically.

greengrass.devicedefinition.device.Thing.Description: The ARN of the device, which is an AWS IoT device (thing).
